item.title: Miwa's Choice Timeline
item.description: In this canon timeline, Calcutta meets Miwa, affecting the way she sees the world whether she likes it or not. However, regardless of what happens, she will proceed with her plans, with Miwa will be the one to try and stop her.

item.title: Fresh Outta Hell Timeline
item.description: In this alternate timeline, Calcutta meets Fresh Outta Hell, a tightly knit aspiring group. Warning This page is still a draft. Expect missing or out-of-date information.

item.title: Calcutta Alone Timeline
item.description: In this canon timeline, Calcutta will never meet anyone until the time she assaults Inkopolis. At that moment, an unspecified agent will come to strike her down.

item.title: Fresh Outta Hell
item.description: A group of budding talents, aiming to reach the skies of turf wars and bangers alike. They are present in the Fresh Outta Hell Timeline, where they are trapped in the city during its assault.

item.title: Smoky's Splatsona
item.description: Smoky’s Splatsona is a black bear, employed as an Inventory Manager at Grizzco Industries. Safety regulations be damned, if you want an automatic slosher, you’ll get an automatic slosher.

item.title: Rain's Splatsona
item.description: Rain’s Splatsona is an Octoling with grey ink and pale skin. Their eyes have red sclerae, and black diplopia pupils. They have a large custom hairstyle (Octolocks or Tentacurl as a fallback), reminiscent of the Wave and Hipster hairstyles, and thin eyebrows.

item.title: Miwa
item.description: Miwa (she/her) is an Inkling with green ink, light skin, and green eyes. She has a custom hairstyle (Megalobraid as a fallback) and thin eyebrows. She wields two Splattershots, despite the accuracy loss.

item.title: Maeryn
item.description: Maeryn (cos/they/it) is an Inkling with yellow ink and light skin. Cos eyes have deep blue sclerae and pupils, with thin white irises. Co has a custom hairstyle (Bed Head as a fallback), and classic eyebrows.

item.title: Lune
item.description: Lune [lyn] (xe/her) is an Octoling with black ink, olive skin, and yellow eyes. Xe has a custom hairstyle covering the left side of her face (Tentatwists as a fallback), and thick eyebrows.

item.title: Karcy
item.description: Karcy (she/they) is an Octoling with purple ink and light skin. Her eyes have star-shaped pupils. She has a custom hairstyle (Tentatwists as a fallback), and thick eyebrows.
